data.content: Approved implementation review: bulk edit now supports terminal state updates (shipped, abandoned, deferred) during multi-select via the Set state control, and the apply-button/resetKey pattern resolves the repeated-same-state dropdown reset bug. Verified bulk updates flow through the existing state-capable update path and sanity gates passed in /Users/cartine/foolery/.claude/worktrees/62fa-apply-button: bun run lint (warnings only, no errors), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test (2060 passed), and bun run build.
